hero_subtitle: SFTY delivers a comprehensive compliance operating view that consolidates risk signals, audit evidence, and workflow status to help executives manage digital asset compliance confidently.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Leadership teams struggle to maintain a clear and timely operating view when compliance data and risk insights remain scattered. This fragmentation slows risk decisions and weakens audit readiness for regulated digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates risk signals, provider outputs, case statuses and audit evidence into a unified dashboard to give leadership clear, timely visibility and control over enterprise compliance operations.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to risk decisions
workflow_description: SFTY organizes compliance data from multiple providers through risk reviews, case management, decision logging and evidence preservation for executive oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One executive view
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides executives a unified oversight layer connecting compliance workflows, risk signals, decisions and audit evidence for clearer, scalable risk control and due diligence readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP leadership with a connected compliance view, combining provider outputs with audit-ready evidence and deployment controls for scalable risk management.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY provide a connected risk overview for executives
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how executive dashboards connect compliance workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports risk review processes
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports scalable compliance risk management
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives a connected compliance risk dashboard to monitor workflows, strengthen auditability, reduce operational risk and support due diligence across digital asset compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects data from KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and regulatory rules into structured cases, decisions and reports within a single operational workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records case history, decision logs and evidence packages, supporting audit-ready compliance records for reviews, inspections and regulatory due diligence.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule providers, orchestrating their outputs without disrupting current compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a neutral compliance control layer that structures provider outputs but does not replace underlying verification or monitoring services.
final_title: Bring executive risk insights into one dashboard
final_description: Review how SFTY consolidates compliance signals, evidence and workflow status for scalable VASP risk oversight.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
